steps.title: Name the shortcoming
steps.content: The problem was a narrow focus on a few North American and Western European countries, caused partly by limited data availability. New access to records from South America and Eastern Europe would reduce that limitation.

steps.title: Choose the remedy word
steps.content: The matching word means to make a problem less severe, which fits the effect of broader data access. Choice A means confirm, Choice C means sort into groups, and Choice D means assume beforehand. The answer is B.
